key_insights.insight: Love is an economy where people bring different values to the table, and acknowledging this can be healthy and honest.
key_insights.quote: I think that people bring different things to the table in relationships. I think love is an economy.

key_insights.insight: Prenuptial agreements are not inherently unromantic; they can provide clarity, security, and a better understanding of each partner's needs.
key_insights.quote: I think a prenup can be a very romantic thing because it's basically saying, look, I love you. You love me. We want this thing to work or else we wouldn't be signing up for it.

key_insights.insight: Preventative maintenance in relationships involves small gestures of courtesy and expressing appreciation to your partner.
key_insights.quote: Some of the simplest examples are very small gestures of courtesy. I mean, think about when you first started dating, all the little things that made the back of your neck tingle about this person.

key_insights.insight: It's important to pay attention to what you're feeling and what your partner is feeling and then say it, to do the preventative maintenance for the realtionship.
key_insights.quote: Pay attention to what you're feeling, to what your partner's feeling, and then say it. You know, I say that all marital problems stem from two things. I don't know what I want, and I don't know how to express it.

key_insights.insight: Sex serves as the glue in a romantic relationship that fundamentally distinguishes it from platonic relationship.
key_insights.quote: Sex is the thing that brings you together. Sex is what makes a romantic relationship a romantic relationship.

key_insights.insight: Couples in a good place should have open conversation where they can "Hit Send Now" to communicate potential problem areas to each other to continue to maintain and improve the relationship.
key_insights.quote: Make the subject heading of the email hitting send now...So they know this is not an attack. This is something I want to get off my chest.

key_insights.insight: Marriage is not a perfect, permanent solution and shouldn't be assumed; it's crucial to understand why one chooses to marry.
key_insights.quote: I think that we should ask the question,what is the problem to which marriage is a solution? And do I have that problem?

key_insights.insight: There is an overemphasis on performative relationship bliss on social media and a lot of relationships are suffering as a result.
key_insights.quote: I see people in my office who publicly are having the greatest relationships ever...And meanwhile, that relationship is nowhere near that amazing as they'd have you believe it.

key_insights.insight: The traditional notion of marriage can make it difficult to look at them as "chapters" in a larger life story, making it more emotionally devastating when they fall apart.
key_insights.quote: I think you should look at relationships as chapters just because a relationship ends in something other than death...It doesn't mean it wasn't successful.

actionable_advice.advice: Practice preventative maintenance by performing small gestures of courtesy to your partner
actionable_advice.how_to: Leave a note for your partner in the morning, expressing appreciation or affection.

actionable_advice.advice: Initiate candid conversations with your partner on a regular basis and label it the "Hit Send Now" technique for candor
actionable_advice.how_to: Use 'Hit Send Now' as subject heading and communicate your potentially challenging feedback. Ensure a non-defensive safe space.

actionable_advice.advice: Before marrying, make sure there's a clearly defined purpose, the marriage provides a solution to a problem.
actionable_advice.how_to: Have a clear rationale on why you are seeking out marriage. Write out the reason and discuss it with your partner.

memorable_stories: Story of prenup enforcing weight-loss clause.
Story of client winning lottery and immediately getting divorced.
Story of the attorney's client whose husband ran her over four times and stabbed her.
Story of client getting his dog back and crying due to the reunion.
contrarian_claims: That a prenuptial agreement can be a romantic act.
That the term 'gold digger' is often misused and doesn't encompass the complexities of what different partners bring to a relationship.
The idea of 'Happy wife, happy life' is ridiculous.
It's possible to cheat and be in love.
There may be a link between performative social media happiness and actual relationship quality.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Divorce Expert: 86% of People Who Divorce Remarry! Why Sex Is Causing Divorces! If They Say This, Do Not Marry Them!
